title: Crunchy Portuguese Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful rice bowl dish with crunchy texture, inspired by Portuguese cuisine. This dish is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Crunchy
ingredients.notes: crunchy chopped vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots)

ingredients.name: Crumble
ingredients.notes: crumbled feta cheese or vegetable crumble

instructions: Heat a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Add 1 cup of uncooked rice, stir, and reduce heat to low.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until water is fully absorbed.
In a separate pan, heat some oil over medium heat.
Add crunchy chopped vegetables and cook until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine cooked rice, crunchy vegetables, and crumbled cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
